glosses.zh-Hans: 部分地; 在一定程度上
glosses.hi: आंशिक रूप से; कुछ हद तक
glosses.ja: 部分的に; ある程度

translations.es: Me van a devolver parte del dinero.
translations.fr: Je vais recevoir un remboursement partiel.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ nhận được hoàn tiền một phần.
translations.hi: मुझे आंशिक रिफंड मिल रहा है.
translations.sv: Jag får tillbaka en del av pengarna.
translations.da: Jeg får nogle af pengene tilbage.
translations.ja: 一部返金を受け取ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; governs a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Erstattung'.
Degree adverb; adnominal use specifying extent of the noun phrase ('Erstattung'); does not inflect.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'bekomme'.

sentences.target: Die teilweise gesperrte Straße nervt alle.

translations.de: Die teilweise gesperrte Straße nervt alle.
translations.en: The partially closed street annoys everyone.
translations.es: La calle parcialmente cortada molesta a todos.
translations.fr: La rue partiellement fermée agace tout le monde.
translations.it: La strada parzialmente chiusa dà fastidio a tutti.
translations.ko: 부분 통제된 도로가 모두를 짜증나게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条部分封闭的道路让大家很烦。
translations.yue: 呢條部分封閉嘅路搞到大家好煩。
translations.pt: A rua parcialmente interditada irrita todo mundo.
translations.he: הרחוב הסגור חלקית מעצבן את כולם.
translations.vi: Con đường bị chặn một phần làm mọi người bực mình.
translations.nl: De gedeeltelijk afgesloten straat irriteert iedereen.
translations.hu: A részlegesen lezárt utca mindenkit idegesít.
translations.hi: आंशिक रूप से बंद सड़क सबको परेशान कर रही है.
translations.el: Ο μερικώς κλειστός δρόμος ενοχλεί τους πάντες.
translations.nb: Den delvis stengte veien irriterer alle.
translations.id: Jalan yang ditutup sebagian membuat semua orang kesal.
translations.sv: Den delvis avstängda gatan irriterar alla.
translations.ro: Strada închisă parțial îi enervează pe toți.
translations.da: Den delvist afspærrede vej irriterer alle.
translations.ja: 一部通行止めの道路はみんなをイライラさせている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner for 'Straße'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'gesperrte'.
Participle used adjectivally, feminine nominative singular; attributive modifier of 'Straße'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'nervt'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; takes 'alle' as direct object.
Indefinite pronoun, accusative plural; direct object of 'nervt'.

sentences.target: Sein teilweise kaputtes Handy lädt nicht mehr.
sentences.reading: /zaɪ̯n ˈtaɪ̯lvaɪ̯zə kaˈpʊtəs ˈhɛndi lɛːt nɪçt meːɐ̯/

translations.de: Sein teilweise kaputtes Handy lädt nicht mehr.
translations.ipa: /zaɪ̯n ˈtaɪ̯lvaɪ̯zə kaˈpʊtəs ˈhɛndi lɛːt nɪçt meːɐ̯/
translations.en: His partly broken phone won’t charge anymore.
translations.es: Su móvil medio roto ya no carga.
translations.fr: Son téléphone, en partie cassé, ne se recharge plus.
translations.it: Il suo telefono, parzialmente rotto, non si ricarica più.
translations.ko: 부분적으로 고장난 그의 휴대폰은 이제 충전이 안 돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他那部有点坏了的手机再也充不进电了。
translations.yue: 佢部有啲壞嘅手機而家充唔到電。
translations.ru: Его частично сломанный телефон больше не заряжается.
translations.pt: O celular dele, que está meio quebrado, não carrega mais.
translations.he: הטלפון שלו, קצת שבור, כבר לא נטען.
translations.tr: Onun kısmen bozuk telefonu artık şarj olmuyor.
translations.vi: Chiếc điện thoại hơi hỏng của anh ấy không còn sạc được nữa.
translations.ar: هاتفه التالف جزئيًا لم يعد يشحن.
translations.nl: Zijn deels kapotte telefoon laadt niet meer op.
translations.uk: Його частково зламаний телефон більше не заряджається.
translations.hu: A részben törött telefonja már nem tölt.
translations.hi: उसका थोड़ा टूटा फोन अब चार्ज नहीं होता.
translations.pl: Jego częściowo zepsuty telefon już się nie ładuje.
translations.el: Το μισοχαλασμένο κινητό του δεν φορτίζει πια.
translations.nb: Den delvis ødelagte telefonen hans lader ikke lenger.
translations.id: Ponselnya yang agak rusak sudah tidak bisa diisi daya lagi.
translations.sv: Hans delvis trasiga telefon laddar inte längre.
translations.ro: Telefonul lui, parțial stricat, nu se mai încarcă.
translations.cs: Jeho částečně rozbitý telefon se už nenabíjí.
translations.da: Hans delvist ødelagte telefon lader ikke længere.
translations.fi: Hänen osittain rikki oleva puhelin ei enää lataudu.
translations.ja: 彼の少し壊れたスマホはもう充電できない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, neuter nominative singular; attributes ownership to 'Handy'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'kaputtes'.
Adjective, neuter nominative singular (attributive, inflected); modifier of 'Handy'.
Common noun, neuter nominative singular; subject of 'lädt'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; irregular (stem vowel change).
Negation particle; negates the predicate, part of the polarity construction 'nicht mehr'.
Temporal/degree adverb used with negation ('nicht mehr') to express cessation; modifies the predicate.

sentences.target: Ich suche eine teilweise möblierte Wohnung.

translations.de: Ich suche eine teilweise möblierte Wohnung.
translations.en: I’m looking for a partly furnished apartment.
translations.fr: Je cherche un appartement partiellement meublé.
translations.ko: 가구가 일부 갖춰진 집을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一套配有部分家具的公寓。
translations.yue: 我想搵間有部分傢俬嘅單位。
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một căn hộ có sẵn một phần nội thất.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een deels gemeubileerd appartement.
translations.hi: मैं आंशिक रूप से सुसज्जित फ्लैट ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en delvis møblert leilighet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari apartemen yang sebagian sudah berperabot.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en delvis möblerad lägenhet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en delvist møbleret lejlighed.
translations.ja: 一部家具付きのアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.

Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Wohnung'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'möblierte'.

Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'.

Su móvil medio roto ya no carga.

La rue partiellement fermée agace tout le monde.
Son téléphone, en partie cassé, ne se recharge plus.
